name: John Kasich
subject: Happy Thanksgiving
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich For America, www
body:
This week we give thanks for the gifts God has bestowed upon us,
our families and our great country. I am incredibly thankful for
the many blessings in my life, especially my wife and daughters.

As you gather with your loved ones on this special day, my family
and I wish you a very happy and safe Thanksgiving.

Sincerely,

John Kasich
Governor of Ohio & Presidential Candidate

Paid for by Kasich For America, www.JohnKasich.com

name: Eric Greitens
subject: Give Thanks
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREITENS FOR MISSOURI
body:
Peter,
As we celebrate Thanksgiving, it's fitting for us to
remember the origins of this special holiday. In 1863, President
Abraham Lincoln issued a proclamation, declaring the last
Thursday in November "as a day of thanksgiving and praise to our
beneficent Father who dwelleth in the heavens."
Let us take the time to thank God for blessing us with
the most free and prosperous country in history, where every
citizen has the right to live a life of dignity, meaning, and
purpose. We must also remember the servicemen and women who are
celebrating Thanksgiving away from their loved ones, as they put
their lives on the line to defend our way of life.
While you enjoy the day with family and friends, Sheena
and I ask you to join us in pausing to thank our veterans and
those currently serving our country who have made it possible for
us to celebrate this holiday. We wish you and your loved ones a
Happy Thanksgiving!
Best,
Eric

PAID FOR BY GREITENS FOR MISSOURI
JEFF STUERMAN, TREASURER

name: Chris Christie
subject: Happy Thanksgiving
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Christie for President, Inc
body:
Peter,
This Thanksgiving, we have a lot to be thankful for. I'm eternally grateful to the brave men and women who are fighting to protect our freedom here and abroad. Without them, opportunities like this to celebrate would not be possible. I'm also thankful for the extraordinary opportunity that I've been afforded by you, my supporters, to run for President.

So from our family to yours, Mary Pat, the kids, and I wish you a very Happy Thanksgiving.

\-- Chris
****

****
****
****

name: George Pataki
subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pataki for President, Inc
body:
Friend,

We all have a lot to be thankful for. Not only do we live in the
greatest country in the world; we also live in the greatest time in
history to be alive.

Thanks to unprecedented advances in computer, medical, and
environmental technology, and other groundbreaking innovations,
Americans are living longer and better lives than they ever have. As
president, I will do everything in my power to build on this progress
and help create a truly twenty-first century economy.

Today, I hope you'll join me in giving thanks for all of the
wonderful opportunities this country has given us. Also, let's give
special thanks to the servicemen and women who keep us safe in a
dangerous world.

Finally, I would like to thank you for all of the support and
encouragement you've given me over the last many months and years.

Very truly yours,

George Pataki

Paid for by Pataki for President, Inc.

www.GeorgePataki.com -
http://cts.vresp.com/c/?WWLLC/15c40934c3/ace65cf3c9/9c17bfc88b
